microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a 2-person operation into a **platformized system**, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive $14M+ business impact across enterprise clients including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, translating strategic business goals into actionable project plans with defined timelines and deliverables, including a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract.

Built an internal AI agent and restructured planning workflows to reduce cycle time by **39%** and increase drill capacity by 21%, demonstrating applied proficiency in generative AI concepts and agent-building for operational program delivery.

Collaborated with cross-functional stakeholders across engineering, operations, and partner teams to identify process improvements, coordinate dependency resolution, and ensure on-time program rollout across 45+ annual execution cycles.

Prepared and presented **program trends and growth opportunities** to senior leadership, synthesizing drill performance data into executive-ready narratives that informed investment decisions and shaped the advisory roadmap for resilience capabilities.

Improved data integrity and retrieval by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool, reducing lookup time by 83% and improving cross-team access to advisory program resources.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets**, stabilize the developer intake process, and maintain program momentum against tight deployment timelines.

Drove strategic alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement automated CI/CD pipelines, **accelerating software deployment** cycles by 25% and establishing a repeatable release framework that reduced manual coordination overhead.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google profile to align messaging with target client needs and drive qualified inbound volume.
